bulk_actions.landing_description: Apply an operation across all {count, plural, one {# listing} other {# listings}} in
bulk_actions.action_duplicate_group_desc: Create a new group with a copy of each listing, optionally replacing a substring in listing names and shifting listing dates by a fixed number of days.
bulk_actions.action_deactivate_group_des: Deactivate every active listing in this group.
bulk_actions.action_reactivate_group_des: Reactivate every listing in this group.
bulk_actions.duplicate_form_description: Creating a new group based on {groupName}. Each listing in the group will be duplicated into the new group with the same settings. Use the fields below to apply a name replacement and/or a date shift across all duplicates.
bulk_actions.form_date_shift_help: Enter a reference date that appears in the current listings and the date you want it to become. All listing dates (and closing times) will be shifted by the same number of days.
bulk_actions.preview_empty: This group has no listings — the new group will be empty.
bulk_actions.deactivate_impact: Deactivating this group will deactivate {count, plural, one {# active listing} other {# active listings}} in
bulk_actions.deactivate_consequence_404: The public ticket page will return a 404 error
bulk_actions.deactivate_consequence_paym: Any pending payments will be rejected
bulk_actions.deactivate_existing_attende: Existing attendees will not be affected.
bulk_actions.deactivate_confirm_prompt: To deactivate this group, type its name "{groupName}" into the box below:
bulk_actions.reactivate_impact: Reactivating this group will reactivate {count, plural, one {# listing} other {# listings}} in
bulk_actions.reactivate_benefits: Their public ticket pages will be accessible and new attendees can register again.
bulk_actions.reactivate_confirm_prompt: To reactivate this group, type its name "{groupName}" into the box below:
